pilot_config.description: Pilot experiments for Iteration 4. All core experiments were already completed in Iteration 3. Pilots serve as quick verification that the experimental pipeline still works and key results are reproducible.

pilots.name: P1: Quick UAD Reproduction
pilots.description: Re-run UAD on GPT-2 Small layer 8 with 100 samples. Verify F1 remains near-zero and same-cluster random baseline matches.
pilots.pass_criteria: F1 <= 0.01, same-cluster random F1 within 2x of UAD F1

pilots.name: P2: Quick Collision Rate Check
pilots.description: Compute collision rate for 10 concept pairs (numbers subset). Verify Spearman r >= 0.3.

pilots.name: P3: Token Mutual Exclusivity Spot Check
pilots.description: Check token-level activations for 2-3 absorption features. Verify they fire on different tokens.
pilots.pass_criteria: Absorption features show zero overlap in token activations

go_no_go_gates.action_if_fail: Investigate discrepancy with prior iteration results
Re-run full experiments, do not proceed with writing

notes: Iteration 4 is primarily a writing/reframing iteration. The pilots are sanity checks, not hypothesis tests. All hypotheses were already confirmed/falsified in Iteration 3.
